name: Itraconazole
description: A systemic triazole antifungal pharmaceutical that blocks the synthesis of ergosterol in fungal cell membranes, causing cell leakage and death.
preparation: Oral capsules: 200mg twice daily with full fat meals or acidic beverages to optimize gastric absorption.
safetyAlert: Contraindicated in patients with congestive heart failure. Requires regular liver function monitoring due to DILI risks.
interactions: Antacids and proton pump inhibitors severely reduce gastrointestinal absorption. Contraindicated with Simvastatin.
